name: FEDERAL REALTY INVESTMENT TRUST
summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns, operates, and develops retail and mixed-use properties across the United States. Its portfolio includes shopping centers, mixed-use communities, and retail properties in markets such as California, Maryland, Virginia, New Jersey, Arizona, and Florida, operated through numerous subsidiaries and joint ventures.

products.name: Shopping Centers
products.description: Ownership and operation of retail shopping center properties across multiple U.S. states.

products.name: Mixed-Use Properties
products.description: Development and operation of mixed-use communities combining retail, residential, and hotel components.

products.name: Hotel Operations
products.description: Hotel ownership and operation through subsidiaries such as Assembly Row Hotel and PNR Hotel XXVI.

partnerships.description: Joint venture partnerships including PrimestorFRIT JV and Jordan Downs JV for retail property development.
Joint venture LLC organized in Delaware for real estate operations.
Joint venture for property operations in California market.
